info.description:
## Interactive API documentation

Interactive API documentation is available at [/v1/docs/interactive](/v1/docs/interactive).

## Authorization

To access the api, use one of the following methods:

- **Basic Auth header**
  Authorization: Basic base64(login:password)


- **URL authentication**
  https://login:password(at)api.appmagic.rocks/v1/mau

## MCP (Model Context Protocol)

Every API operation is exposed as an MCP tool for AI agents at `/mcp` (JSON-RPC 2.0, Streamable HTTP transport).

### Integrate with Claude Code

```
claude mcp add --transport http appmagic https://api.appmagic.rocks/mcp --header "Authorization: Basic $AUTH"
```

get.description: Retrieves the App Info data for the apps searched by their names or name prefixes.

parameters.description:
Search queries. Search queries are based on prefixes. For example, you will find “Fortnite”
if you enter “Fort”, but you won’t find it if you enter “nite”.
The search field is not case-sensitive, but it is sensitive to the order of words you enter. For example,
you will find “Pokemon Go” if you enter “pokemon go”, but you won’t find it if you enter “go pokemon”.
